task.title: Add history filter to lab page

requirements.description: Add a keyword filter input for recent history in the lab page and render only matching history rows while preserving existing run/refill actions.
acceptance: History card shows a filter input field
History list reacts to filter text and only shows matching items
An explicit no-match hint appears when filter has no matches
